scripts.format: prettier --write app components lib scripts tests types README.md MANUAL.md package.json eslint.config.mjs next.config.ts postcss.config.mjs tsconfig.json tsconfig.test.json docker-compose.yml
scripts.format:check: prettier --check app components lib scripts tests types README.md MANUAL.md package.json eslint.config.mjs next.config.ts postcss.config.mjs tsconfig.json tsconfig.test.json docker-compose.yml
scripts.test: npm run test:build && npm run test:run
scripts.ci: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run test
